category_sources: Official Bitcoin Core about page describes Bitcoin Core as full-node and wallet software for the Bitcoin network.
source_facts.description says Bitcoin Core is a decentralized peer-to-peer payment network client.
display_name_sources: Official bitcoincore.org and github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin identify the software as Bitcoin Core.
docs_sources: Official Bitcoin Core website provides the documentation area.
Official Doxygen site links back to github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin and bitcoincore.org.
Official repository includes the project doc directory.
repo_sources: Official Bitcoin Core GitHub repository is github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin.
Official bitcoincore.org about page references project software and contributors on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official Bitcoin Core about page describes full-node and wallet functionality.
source_facts.description identifies a decentralized peer-to-peer payment network.
